package com.app.service;

import org.xml.sax.InputSource;
import org.xml.sax.SAXException;
import org.xml.sax.SAXParseException;
import org.xml.sax.helpers.DefaultHandler;
import javax.xml.XMLConstants;
import javax.xml.parsers.ParserConfigurationException;
import javax.xml.parsers.SAXParser;
import javax.xml.parsers.SAXParserFactory;
import javax.xml.transform.stream.StreamSource;
import javax.xml.validation.Schema;
import javax.xml.validation.SchemaFactory;
import javax.xml.validation.Validator;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.StringReader;
import java.io.StringWriter;

public class XmlProcessingService {
    
    private Schema schema;

    /**
     * Loads and compiles an XML Schema from string content using JAXP.
     * This method validates the schema's format and prepares it for subsequent data validation.
     *
     * @param schemaContent A string containing the XML Schema (XSD) content.
     * @throws Exception If any error occurs during schema parsing or validation.
     */
    public void loadSchema(String schemaContent) throws Exception {
        if (schemaContent == null || schemaContent.trim().isEmpty()) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Schema content cannot be null or empty.");
        }

        try {
            SchemaFactory factory = SchemaFactory.newInstance(XMLConstants.W3C_XML_SCHEMA_NS_URI);
            
            // Set error handler to handle warnings and errors
            factory.setErrorHandler(new DefaultHandler() {
                @Override
                public void warning(SAXParseException e) {
                    System.out.println("Schema parsing warning: " + e.getMessage());
                }

                @Override
                public void error(SAXParseException e) throws SAXException {
                    throw new SAXException("Schema validation error: " + e.getMessage(), e);
                }

                @Override
                public void fatalError(SAXParseException e) throws SAXException {
                    throw new SAXException("Schema validation fatal error: " + e.getMessage(), e);
                }
            });

            // Parse and compile the schema
            schema = factory.newSchema(new InputSource(new StringReader(schemaContent)));
            
            System.out.println("XML Schema loaded and parsed successfully.");
            
        } catch (SAXException e) {
            throw new Exception("Failed to parse XML Schema due to content errors: " + e.getMessage(), e);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new Exception("An unexpected error occurred while loading XML Schema: " + e.getMessage(), e);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Validates XML data against the loaded schema.
     *
     * @param xmlData The XML data to validate as a string.
     * @throws Exception If validation fails or no schema is loaded.
     */
    public void validateXmlData(String xmlData) throws Exception {
        if (schema == null) {
            throw new IllegalStateException("Schema must be loaded before validating XML data.");
        }
        
        if (xmlData == null || xmlData.trim().isEmpty()) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("XML data cannot be null or empty.");
        }

        try {
            Validator validator = schema.newValidator();
            
            // Set error handler for validation
            validator.setErrorHandler(new DefaultHandler() {
                @Override
                public void warning(SAXParseException e) {
                    System.out.println("XML validation warning: " + e.getMessage());
                }

                @Override
                public void error(SAXParseException e) throws SAXException {
                    throw new SAXException("XML validation error: " + e.getMessage(), e);
                }

                @Override
                public void fatalError(SAXParseException e) throws SAXException {
                    throw new SAXException("XML validation fatal error: " + e.getMessage(), e);
                }
            });

            // Validate the XML data
            validator.validate(new StreamSource(new StringReader(xmlData)));
            
            System.out.println("XML data validated successfully.");
            
        } catch (SAXException e) {
            throw new Exception("XML validation failed: " + e.getMessage(), e);
        } catch (IOException e) {
            throw new Exception("Error reading XML data during validation: " + e.getMessage(), e);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new Exception("An unexpected error occurred during XML validation: " + e.getMessage(), e);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Returns the compiled XML Schema for validation use.
     * @return The compiled Schema object
     */
    public Schema getSchema() {
        return schema;
    }
    
    /**
     * Securely parses XML content using SAX parser with XXE protection.
     *
     * @param xmlContent The XML content to parse as a string.
     * @param handler The content handler to process the parsed XML.
     * @throws Exception If parsing fails.
     */
    public void parseXmlContent(String xmlContent, DefaultHandler handler) throws Exception {
        if (xmlContent == null || xmlContent.trim().isEmpty()) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("XML content cannot be null or empty.");
        }

        try {
            SAXParserFactory factory = SAXParserFactory.newInstance();
            
            // Security: Disable external entities and DTD processing
            factory.setFeature(XMLConstants.FEATURE_SECURE_PROCESSING, true);
            factory.setFeature("http://apache.org/xml/features/disallow-doctype-decl", true);
            factory.setFeature("http://xml.org/sax/features/external-general-entities", false);
            factory.setFeature("http://xml.org/sax/features/external-parameter-entities", false);
            
            // Namespace awareness
            factory.setNamespaceAware(true);
            
            SAXParser parser = factory.newSAXParser();
            parser.parse(new InputSource(new StringReader(xmlContent)), handler);
            
            System.out.println("XML content parsed successfully.");
            
        } catch (ParserConfigurationException e) {
            throw new Exception("Parser configuration error: " + e.getMessage(), e);
        } catch (SAXException e) {
            throw new Exception("SAX parsing error: " + e.getMessage(), e);
        } catch (IOException e) {
            throw new Exception("I/O error during XML parsing: " + e.getMessage(), e);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new Exception("An unexpected error occurred during XML parsing: " + e.getMessage(), e);
        }
    }
}
